title: Amazon is testing Alexa+ in India with Hindi support
friendlyTitle: Amazon is testing a Hindi version of Alexa+ in India
summary: TechCrunch reports that Amazon has invited selected Indian users to beta test Alexa+ with Hindi-language support. The test appears to target Hindi and Hindi-English code-mixed voice use, though Amazon has not announced a full India launch date.
friendlySummary: Amazon is inviting some users in India to test Alexa+ with Hindi support.
whyItMatters: Voice assistants become much more useful when they understand local languages and everyday speech patterns. For India’s large Hindi-speaking market, better conversational AI could make AI assistance accessible to users who do not want to type prompts in English.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This could help more people use AI by speaking naturally in their own language or mixing Hindi and English.
